goal: Implement pi-threads: a pi extension that replaces pi-subagents with Slate-style thread/episode architecture

features.description: Named persistent thread action returns a structured JSON episode (not raw output)
steps: Call thread({ name: 'test', task: 'list files in cwd' })
Verify tool result content contains formatted episode (objective, key_findings, conclusions)
Verify episodes.json is written to thread dir

features.description: Named thread resumes prior session context across multiple actions
steps: Call thread({ name: 'ctx-test', task: 'remember the number 42' })
Call thread({ name: 'ctx-test', task: 'what number did I ask you to remember?' })
Verify second response references 42 (proving session was resumed)

features.description: Ephemeral one-shot thread (no name) returns episode, no persistence
steps: Call thread({ task: 'say hello', agent: 'scout' })
Verify episode is returned in content
Verify NO thread dir is created in threads/

features.description: Episode extraction uses configurable cheap model
steps: Run any thread action
Verify episode extraction spawns subprocess with --models <episodeModel>
Verify episode JSON has all required fields: objective, key_findings, conclusions, files_read, files_modified
Create thread 'source' with one action
Call thread({ name: 'consumer', task: '...', seed_from: ['source'] })
Verify consumer thread's system prompt contains source thread's episodes

features.description: Chain mode: each step gets prior step's episode as {previous}
steps: Call thread({ chain: [{ agent: 'scout', task: 'list root files' }, { agent: 'planner', task: 'Based on: {previous}, suggest improvements' }] })
Verify second step task has episode content substituted for {previous}
Verify final result contains all step episodes

features.description: Parallel mode: multiple agents run concurrently, all episodes returned
steps: Call thread({ tasks: [{ task: 'list root files', agent: 'scout' }, { task: 'check git status', agent: 'scout' }] })
Verify both tasks run concurrently
Verify both episodes are in the result

features.description: thread({ list: true }) shows all active threads
steps: Create 2 named threads with actions
Call thread({ list: true })
Verify both threads appear with name, agent, episode count, last activity

features.description: thread({ episodes: 'thread-name' }) returns full episode history
steps: Run 2 actions on a named thread
Call thread({ episodes: 'thread-name' })
Verify both episodes are returned in full

features.description: thread({ destroy: 'thread-name' }) removes thread and its data
steps: Create a named thread
Call thread({ destroy: 'thread-name' })
Verify thread dir is deleted
Verify thread no longer appears in list

features.description: Threads older than 7 days are auto-cleaned on session_start
steps: Manually create a thread dir with lastActivity timestamp 8 days ago
Reload extension (session_start fires)
Verify old thread dir is deleted

features.description: Agent discovery: user agents (~/.pi/agent/agents/*.md) take priority over builtins
steps: Create a user agent with same name as builtin (e.g. scout)
Run thread({ agent: 'scout', task: '...' })
Verify user agent's system prompt is used, not builtin
Type /run scout list files in cwd
Verify thread tool is called with { task: '...', agent: 'scout' }
Verify result appears in conversation
Type /chain scout 'find files' -> planner 'analyze'
Verify chain tool call is made
Type /parallel scout 'task1' -> scout 'task2'
Verify parallel tool call is made

features.description: TUI rendering: collapsed view shows episode summary, expanded shows full detail
steps: Run a thread action
Verify collapsed view shows thread name, objective, key findings count
Press Ctrl+O to expand
Verify expanded view shows full episode with all fields

features.description: Fallback episode: if extraction fails, graceful fallback with raw output summary
steps: Configure invalid episode model in config.json
Run a thread action
Verify tool still returns a result (fallback episode with conclusions = truncated raw output)
Verify no crash
